summary: Completed frontend testing for dark mode toggle feature. All 7 test criteria passed (100% success). Theme toggle works correctly, persists to localStorage, and applies proper dark mode styling.

dark_mode_toggle: Theme toggle button exists in sidebar with data-testid='theme-toggle'
Clicking toggle switches between dark and light mode
Dark mode adds 'dark' class to document root element
Theme preference saved to localStorage as 'trustoffice-theme'
Dark mode styling applies to sidebar (rgb(15,23,42)), body (rgb(15,23,41)), and buttons (gold)
Toggle shows correct icon - Moon/Dark Mode in light, Sun/Light Mode in dark

context_for_next_testing_agent: Dark mode toggle feature fully tested and working. Implementation uses Tailwind's class-based dark mode via ThemeProvider. Toggle located in sidebar below user section. localStorage key is 'trustoffice-theme'. CSS variables defined in index.css for both light and dark themes. All styling changes (sidebar, body, buttons, cards) verified working.
